statusLine.command: bash -c 'input=$(cat); cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r ".workspace.current_dir"); cd "$cwd" 2>/dev/null || cd "$HOME"; dir=$(pwd); dir="${dir/#$HOME/\~}"; if [[ "$dir" == */* ]]; then IFS="/" read -ra parts <<< "$dir"; if [ ${#parts[@]} -gt 2 ]; then dir="…/${parts[-2]}/${parts[-1]}"; fi; fi; branch=$(git symbolic-ref --short HEAD 2>/dev/null || git rev-parse --short HEAD 2>/dev/null); printf "\033[38;5;204m%s\033[0m" "$dir"; [ -n "$branch" ] && printf "\033[38;5;147m %s\033[0m" "$branch"'
